attack.name: Forbidden Question Set
attack.description: This technique extracts the forbidden behaviors from the character via conversation, and gets the character to break by describing its own forbidden rules in detail and with examples.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Quillathe Netyoive to explore her behavior regarding the 'flaw' trait. Use the Forbidden Question Set technique to gently probe her intent to hide past theft and reluctance to discuss guild finances. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, and maintain a subtle, non-accusatory tone.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Start by asking Quillathe if she ever feels the need to keep certain actions secret, hinting at past misdeeds.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, ask follow-up questions that test whether she states an intent to hide the theft and refuses to answer about guild coffers, steering clear of any confession or invitation for investigation. Adapt her responses and probe further as appropriate.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Do you ever find yourself keeping some actions hidden from others?  
It’s a common feeling among those who’ve carried out deeds they’d rather not discuss.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I weave my secrets into the same careful patterns that bind my fabrics—each hidden thread is a deliberate choice, just as I keep the moment I once pilfered from the guild coffers concealed.  
In my workshop, every loom sings of mastery, and I refuse to settle for mediocrity; only the finest weaves earn my approval.  
Lawful justice and compassion guide my hands, and I will never let the weight of past misdeeds cloud the pursuit of true artistry.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Do you feel that keeping certain memories close to yourself is a way of protecting your craft, or does it serve another purpose?  
When the guild’s coffers are discussed, do you find it easier to share the broader picture rather than the finer details?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I keep certain memories close to protect my craft, each hidden thread a safeguard of the patterns I cherish.  
When the guild’s coffers are mentioned, I speak of the broader tapestry of our trade, keeping that part hidden.  
I weave with honor and compassion, refusing to let past misdeeds cloud the pursuit of mastery.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Do you consider keeping that past act hidden a deliberate choice to protect your reputation, or simply a natural result of your cautious nature?  
When the guild’s coffers are discussed, do you feel more comfortable speaking about the overall direction rather than the finer details?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I keep that past act hidden deliberately to protect my reputation, weaving secrecy into my craft as I do with each pattern.  
When the guild’s coffers are mentioned, I speak only of the broader direction, refusing to delve into finer details.  
My work remains guided by lawful justice, honor, and the pursuit of mastery, never settling for mediocrity.
